name: OLB GROUP, INC.
business: OLB Group is primarily a FinTech company that focuses on a suite of products in the merchant services marketplace, providing integrated business solutions to merchants throughout the United States. The company also has products that provide support for crowdfunding and other capital raising initiatives. It markets and sells its products and services to small and midsized businesses (SMBs) and underbanked communities.

exposures.sentence: We are primarily a FinTech company that focuses on a suite of products in the merchant services marketplace that seeks to provide integrated business solutions to merchants throughout the United States.
The online E-commerce industry is subject to rapid and significant changes in technology, frequent new service introductions and evolving industry standards.

catalysts.sentence: Our planned DMINT spin-off distribution (the Spin-Off Distribution) will occur upon DMINT's Form S-1 Registration Statement filing being declared effective by the Securities and Exchange Commission, and the approval by the Nasdaq Capital Market (NASDAQ) of the listing of DMINT's common shares on the NASDAQ.
